name: Mayonnaise (Dupree)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup oil, room temp or warmer
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, using a small whisk, beat the eggs and 1/8 teaspoon each of salt, pepper, and mustard until thick and sticky.
2. Gradually add 1/4 cup of oil to the egg mixture, stirring constantly until emulsified.
3. Add 1 tablespoon of lemon juice and continue beating.
4. Continue adding oil in small amounts while beating until all the oil is incorporated into the mixture.
5. Taste and adjust with additional lemon juice or salt as desired.
Makes 1-1/4 to 1-3/4 cups
